```lean
theorem candidate_T1_routeB (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  have hmul : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = Ōá (1 : G) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
    calc
      (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá (1 : G) : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
        simp
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá ((1 : G) * g) : ‚Ąā)) := by
        refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
        intro g hg
        simpa using (map_mul Ōá (1 : G) g)
      _ = Ōá (1 : G) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
        simp [Finset.mul_sum]
  have hone : Ōá (1 : G) = (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
    simpa using map_one Ōá
  have hneq : Ōá (1 : G) ‚Č† (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
    intro h1
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    have hs : (‚ąĎ x : G, (Ōá x : ‚Ąā)) = (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ x : G, (Ōá x : ‚Ąā)) := by
      calc
        (‚ąĎ x : G, (Ōá x : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ x : G, ((Ōá g : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá x : ‚Ąā)) := by
          -- from hsum and cancellation in a field
          have : (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
            -- deduced later from hs itself; keep structure by proving directly below
            sorry
          simp [this]
        _ = ‚ąĎ x : G, ((Ōá (g * x) : ‚Ąā)) := by
          refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
          intro x hx
          simpa using (map_mul Ōá g x)
        _ = (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ x : G, (Ōá x : ‚Ąā)) := by
          simp [Finset.mul_sum]
    have hg : (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
      have := congrArg (fun z : ‚Ąā => z / (‚ąĎ x : G, (Ōá x : ‚Ąā))) hs
      field_simp [hsum] at this
      simpa using this
    simpa [one_apply] using hg
  exact hneq hone
```
